case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS. CHRISTOPHER A LEEDER

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT LEEDER, CHRISTOPHER A JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEEDER, CHRISTOPHER A $788.24 PRINCIPAL, $106.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $894.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF WRIT OF EXECUTION, ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON APR-01-2003; RETURNED AND FILED UNSATISFIED.
